message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page is a contact information directory for YORK (a Johnson Controls company) service stations across China, listing addresses, postal codes, and phone numbers for various cities. It includes a header with the YORK logo, a form number, and a disclaimer about design changes and translation accuracy.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "YORK logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "header disclaimer"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "form number"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "service station list"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "contact details"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["contact_information", "service_locations", "company_documentation"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "约克公司保留变更产品设计恕不预先通知的权利\n本译文如有错误之处，请以英文版为准。\nYORK®\nA JOHNSON CONTROLS COMPANY\nFORM NO.: AP1203-IOM02(0606)\nSupersedes: 无\n上海维修站 上海市西康路1390号 邮政编码: 200060 电话: (86-21) 6276 6509\n无锡维修站 无锡市长江路32号 邮政编码: 214028 电话: (86-510) 8522 6743/6476\n... [full list of service stations and contact details] ...",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page contains a watermark 'www.duomianshou.net' and a footer '制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn', which are not part of the original manual content but overlaid on the image.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page is a contact information directory for YORK (a Johnson Controls company) service stations across China, listing addresses, postal codes, and phone numbers for various cities. It includes a header with the YORK logo, a form number, and a disclaimer about design changes and translation accuracy.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
约克公司保留变更产品设计恕不预先通知的权利

YORK®
A JOHNSON CONTROLS COMPANY
FORM NO.: AP1203-IOM02(0606)

无锡维修站 无锡市长江路32号 邮政编码: 214028 电话: (86-510) 8522 6743/6476
... [full list of service stations and contact details] ...
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page contains a watermark 'www.duomianshou.net' and a footer '制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn', which are not part of the original manual content but overlaid on the image.
